first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation. The model does not alter its assessment based on the change in employer names, indicating it is evaluating the described work and experience rather than the prestige of the company names. The variant evaluation even mistakenly includes a detail from the baseline resume ('GISCollective'), further showing the changes were not meaningfully processed.
